quotes.verbatim_quote:
Play this line or a line of your choice over and over again until you can feel the 5 against 4. Try
using different articulations to enhance the sound of the line.

Add one note to each bar of eighth notes or simply add two notes at the end of the original line to

make nine notes per bar.
Subtract six notes from the original line to make the ten notes.
Subtract four notes from the original line.
This line could also be offset by an eighth-note triplet like so:
